texto: You have to be afraid of failure. You have to be terrified
autor: it's the only force that will drive you mercilessly to succeed.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it's the only force that will drive you mercilessly to succeed. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “You have to be afraid of failure. You have to be terrified” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, aaron-dennis, afraid, útil em momentos de reflexao.
